[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101100110 5
1 1101101110 7
2 0100001001 3
3 0001011011 5
4 1011010101 6
5 1010011001 5
6 1100101000 4
7 1110110000 5

01 10 0000100001 2
12 21 1000100001 3
23 32 0101100010 4
34 43 0000000000 a
45 54 1000001000 2
56 65 1100100000 3
67 76 1110110000 5 match 7
70 07 0110110011 6

02 20 0111100011 6
13 31 0000100000 1
24 42 1010001001 4

25 52 1100101000 4 match 6
36 63 0100100000 2
47 74 1010010001 4
50 05 0100100000 2
61 16 1000100000 2
72 27 1110100011 6
